creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
E.g.:
g1-51(12.4-S)[5] cd /usr/ports/!$
cd /usr/ports/devel/kf5-extra-cmake-modules
g1-51(12.4-S)[6] sudo make fetch
Password:
===>  License BSD3CLAUSE accepted by the user
===>   kf5-extra-cmake-modules-5.111.0 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> extra-cmake-modules-5.111.0.tar.xz doesn't seem to exist in /common/ports/distfiles/KDE/frameworks/5.111.0.
=> Attempting to fetch https://download.kde.org/stable/frameworks/5.111/extra-cmake-modules-5.111.0.tar.xz
fetch: https://download.kde.org/stable/frameworks/5.111/extra-cmake-modules-5.111.0.tar.xz: Permission denied
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/KDE/frameworks/5.111.0/extra-cmake-modules-5.111.0.tar.xz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/KDE/frameworks/5.111.0/extra-cmake-modules-5.111.0.tar.xz: Forbidden
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /common/ports/distfiles/KDE/frameworks/5.111.0 and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /common/ports/devel/kf5-extra-cmake-modules
g1-51(12.4-S)[7]

Above was running:
FreeBSD g1-51.catwhisker.org 12.4-STABLE FreeBSD 12.4-STABLE #1435 stable/12-n236319-ee4bdd4b0db5: Fri Nov  3 11:18:25 UTC 2023     root@g1-70.catwhisker.org:/common/S1/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/CANARY  amd64 1204500 1204500

with the ports tree at main-n639068-b1f86e131b56.

I was able to reproduce it under
FreeBSD 13.2-STABLE #796 stable/13-n256667-18d51c3c305f: Fri Nov  3 12:16:17 UTC 2023     root@g1-70.catwhisker.org:/common/S3/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/CANARY amd64 1302508 1302508

with the same ports tree, as well as with poudriere (under each of the above, with the same ports tree).
